---
name: Request a bundled skill
about: Propose a skill for the embedded community library
title: "[skill] "
labels: skill-request
---

## Workflow

Single workflow only—what should the agent do step-by-step?

## Stack / tools

Languages, hosts (Linux/macOS), external CLIs assumed available.

## Safety & boundaries

Destructive commands, prod DBs, secrets—what must **never** happen?

## Prior art

Links or pasted outlines you already use.

## Would you contribute it?

- [ ] I can open a PR with `SKILL.md` under `internal/community/assets/<id>/`
